source: eccodes 2.34.1 grib_get_data + grib_get. Oracle for DRS template 5.200 (grid_run_length) at bitsPerValue=4 with a negative decimal scale (raw byte 129 -> sign-magnitude -1). Hand-built by tools/build_grib2_runlength_fixtures.py. Exercises sub-byte code packing, base-10 multi-digit runs, single-point runs, and missing (level 0). Provenance in NOTICE.md.
